label: PR.DS-11
definition: Backups of data are created, protected, maintained, and tested

label: RECOVER
definition: Assets and operations affected by a cybersecurity incident are restored

label: Incident Recovery Plan Execution
definition: Restoration activities are performed to ensure operational availability of systems and services affected by cybersecurity incidents

label: RC.RP-03
definition: The integrity of backups and other restoration assets is verified before using them for restoration

label: RC.RP-06
definition: The end of incident recovery is declared based on criteria, and incident-related documentation is completed
